message:
fix: dismissMission now cancels backend execution before removing UI state (#5822)

Previously dismissMission only removed the mission from UI state,
leaving the backend WebSocket streaming and executing commands silently.
Now calls cancelMission first to send cancel_chat over WebSocket.

Fixes #5816

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
